title: Kres'ten'tarthi
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Kres'ten'tarthi
(Stent) |homeworld=[[Kres'ten'tarthi's homeworld]]{{StoryCite|story=Crisis of Faith|book=Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |skin=Blue |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Empire of the Hand]] **[[Gray Squadron (Empire of the Hand)|Gray Squadron]] **[[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|There are a hundred different threats out there that would freeze your blood if you knew about them.|Stent, to [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]|''[[Vision of the Future]]''}} '''Kres'ten'tarthi''',{{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}} better known by his core name of '''Stent''', was one of the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] followers of [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], better known as [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] Thrawn. Stent served the Grand Admiral as a [[TIE pilot]] and the leader of his [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx|Household Phalanx]] troops. Although Thrawn [[Death/Legends|died]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Stent remained loyal to him, and by [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he was serving as [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of Thrawn's [[Phalanx (Chiss)|Household Phalanx]], based at the [[Hand of Thrawn]] on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. This was a "renegade phalanx" that was not part of the Chiss military and did not take orders from the Chiss government, but appears in practice to have operated under the command of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]. On at least one occasion, Stent explicitly identified the Phalanx as being under the authority of the [[Empire of the Hand]]. Stent was almost killed later that [[Standard year/Legends|year]] in a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Battle of Rhigar|raid]] while visiting a [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]] [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy|military academy]] on [[Rhigar/Legends|Rhigar]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' but in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], he appeared again at Nirauan. {{Char-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' resolved Stent's death timeline problem, stating that Stent survived the attack on the Rhigar academy.''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Crisis of Faith|book=Heir to the Empire: The 20th Anniversary Edition}} *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *{{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}} *''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stID|Kres'ten'tarthi|in book}} ==Sources== *{{GamerCite|5|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Chiss}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040226eu|text=Voss Parck}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Unknown Regions]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kres'ten'tarthi }} [[Category:Chiss]] [[Category:Empire of the Hand personnel]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Nirauan residents]] [[Category:Officers]]
